eng.definition: Characterized by vulgar or pretentious display; designed to impress or attract notice.
examples: Her ostentatious lifestyle was the talk of the town.
The ostentatious display of wealth did not impress everyone.
Despite his success, he was never ostentatious.
हमें अपनी स्वतंत्रता का सम्मान करना चाहिए।
उसने अपनी स्वतंत्रता के लिए संघर्ष किया।
